ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fashion_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fashion item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the fashion item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of fashion item (e.g., clothing, accessories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fashion item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the fashion item belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the fashion item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the fashion item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., gender, measure) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., female, log_ntimes) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_attributes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probability_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability distribution */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the distribution belongs to */,
  "mu" REAL /* Mean of the probability distribution */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Standard deviation of the probability distribution */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability value */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of probability distribution (e.g., normal, uniform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probability_distributions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_types" (
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure type */,
  "measure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure type */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the measure type (e.g., times, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the fashion item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the fashion item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_readmes" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., text, pdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_readmes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES item_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_measure_history" (
  "measure_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure history entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the measure history entry belongs to */,
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure type the measure history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_measure_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_measure_history_measure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_type_id") REFERENCES measure_types ("measure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_measure_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the collaboration is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is being collaborated with */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fashion item the report is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES fashion_items ("item_id")
)
